units.heading: Module overview page
units.text: A module overview page opens with the module learning objectives, a short summary of the topics, and a checklist of what students will read, watch, and submit.

units.heading: Syllabus page
units.text: A syllabus page states the course description, instructor contact information, grading breakdown, required materials, and the institutional accessibility and academic-integrity policies.

units.heading: Assignment page
units.text: An assignment page describes the task, lists the submission steps, states the due date and point value, and links the grading rubric so expectations are explicit.

units.heading: Discussion prompt
units.text: A discussion prompt poses an open question, sets expectations for the initial post and peer replies, and gives a clear deadline for each.
